title: GAO-17-625 (Full Report): SSA's Compassionate Allowance Initiative (2017)
description: Full text of GAO report GAO-17-625 (60-page PDF, August 2017), 'SSA's Compassionate Allowance Initiative: Improvements Needed to Make Expedited Processing of Disability Claims More Consistent and Accurate', a report to the Chairman, Subcommittee on Social Security, House Committee on Ways and Means. Provides the complete findings on CAL condition designation, claim-identification software and DDS manual corrections, and the staleness of impairment summaries plus underused adjudication data; full scope/methodology (analysis of FY2009–FY2016 CAL decisions and FY2016 manual actions, 74-file nongeneralizable sample, interviews in six DDS offices), all eight recommendations, and SSA comments. Companion full-text representation of the gao-17-625 base record.

source.title: SSA's Compassionate Allowance Initiative: Improvements Needed to Make Expedited Processing of Disability Claims More Consistent and Accurate (GAO-17-625, Full Report)

notes: Authoritative: extracted full text of the published 60-page GAO-17-625 PDF. Full-report representation in the gao-17-625 family (base = oversight/gao/gao-17-625; this family has no -summary). url points to GAO's full-report PDF asset. PDF-to-text extraction may contain layout artifacts. temporal_coverage reflects analyzed data years (FY2009–FY2016) per the report scope, not the 2017 publication date. Narrative document, no declared column schema.
